HOME.TITLE: Welcome to SparkPlan
HOME.SUBTITLE: Transform your ideas into actionable plans with AI and automation.

HERO.TITLE: Turn Your Ideas Into Action Plans
HERO.SUBTITLE: SparkPlan uses AI to convert your thoughts into structured, actionable plans — automatically saved to your Google Drive.

HOW_IT_WORKS.HEADING: How It Works
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_1_DESC: Secure authentication using your Google account.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_2_DESC: Describe your idea in any language — simple or detailed.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_3_DESC: Our AI creates a structured plan with steps, resources, and timelines.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_4_DESC: Your plan is automatically saved to your Google Drive in a dedicated folder.

FEATURES.HEADING: Why SparkPlan?
FEATURES.FEATURE_1_DESC: Generate complete plans in seconds, not hours.
FEATURES.FEATURE_2_DESC: Write in English or Spanish — AI adapts to your language.
FEATURES.FEATURE_3_DESC: All plans are securely stored in your personal Google Drive.

PRICING.HEADING: Choose Your Plan
PRICING.SUBHEADING: Start free and upgrade when you need it

CTA.HEADING: Ready to Bring Your Ideas to Life?
CTA.TEXT: Join thousands of creators, entrepreneurs, and thinkers using SparkPlan.

WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Ready to turn your next idea into reality?

IDEA_FORM.TITLE: Share Your Idea
IDEA_FORM.LABEL: Describe your idea
IDEA_FORM.PLACEHOLDER: Example: A mobile app to help people find local farmer's markets and connect directly with producers...
IDEA_FORM.MIN_LENGTH_ERROR: Please write at least 50 characters to help us better understand your idea.
IDEA_FORM.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your plan has been successfully generated!
IDEA_FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Something went wrong. Please try again.
IDEA_FORM.TIP_1: Write in your preferred language — the plan will be generated in that language
IDEA_FORM.TIP_2: Focus on describing your main idea, not the format or structure
IDEA_FORM.TIP_3: Be specific about your goals and target audience
IDEA_FORM.TIP_4: Don't worry about length — quality over quantity

PLAN_HISTORY.EMPTY: You don't have any saved plans yet.
PLAN_HISTORY.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This action cannot be undone. The plan will be permanently deleted.

PLANS.META_DESCRIPTION: Choose the perfect plan for your needs
PLANS.TITLE: Choose your plan
PLANS.SUBTITLE: Select the plan that best fits your needs

DONATION.TITLE: Buy us a coffee
DONATION.DESCRIPTION: If SparkPlan has been useful to you, consider making a small donation. Your support helps us maintain and improve the app for everyone.

USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.TITLE: Limit reached
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.MESSAGE_DAILY: You've reached your limit of {limit} plans today ({currentUsage}/{limit}).
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.MESSAGE_WEEKLY: You've reached your limit of {limit} plans this week ({currentUsage}/{limit}).
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.UPGRADE_CTA: Upgrade your plan to get more plans
